revision.text:
{{Navbox with columns | name = Sup and sub-related templates | state = {{{state|}}} | title = 上付きと下付きに関するテンプレート
<!--------------------------- {{sup}}/{{sub}} and related -----------------------------> | col1header = <nowiki>{{sup}}</nowiki>および関連するテンプレート | col1 = {{Aligned table |cols=3 |class=nowrap |style=font-family:Arial
| {{tlbare|sup}} | | text{{sup|superscript}}{{spaces|4}}{{sup|superscript}}text
| {{tlbare|smallsup}} | ({{tlbare|ssup}}) | text{{smallsup|small superscript}}{{spaces|4}}{{smallsup|small superscript}}text
| {{tlbare|i sup}} | ({{tlbare|isup}}{{int:dot-separator}}{{tlbare|padlsup}}) | ''text''{{i sup|superscript}}{{spaces|2}}({{smaller|rather than:}} ''text''{{sup|superscript}})
| {{tlbare|i smallsup}} | ({{tlbare|issup}}{{int:dot-separator}}{{tlbare|padlssup}}) | ''text''{{i smallsup|small superscript}}{{spaces|2}}({{smaller|rather than:}} ''text''{{smallsup|small superscript}})
| {{tlbare|sub}} | | text{{sub|subscript}}{{spaces|4}}{{sub|subscript}}text
| {{tlbare|smallsub}} | ({{tlbare|ssub}}) | text{{smallsub|small subscript}}{{spaces|4}}{{smallsub|small subscript}}text
| {{tlbare|subsub}} | | text{{subsub|double-subscripted}}{{spaces|4}}{{subsub|double-subscripted}}text }}
<!---------------------------- Combined sup/sub -------------------------------> | col2style = border-left:1px solid #aaa; | col2header = 上付きと下付きの組み合わせ | col2 = {{Aligned table |cols=3 |class=nowrap |style=font-family:Arial
| {{tlbare|su}} | | text{{su|p=p=superscript|b=b=subscript}}{{spaces|4}}{{su|p=p=superscript|b=b=subscript}}text
| {{tlbare|sup sub}} | | text{{sup sub|sup|sub}}{{spaces|4}}{{sup sub|sup|sub}}text
| {{tlbare|subsup}} | | {{subsup|text|sub|sup}}
| {{tlbare|±}} | | 1.23{{±|4|2}}
| {{tlbare|overunderset}} / {{tlbare|underoverset}} | | {{overunderset|text|superscript|subscript}} }}
| below = [[添え字]]
}}<noinclude>{{ドキュメント}}</noinclude>
